tasks.title: Stand up self-hosted Cap instance
tasks.description: Deploy CapSoftware/Cap on Hetzner CX22 or Oracle ARM using docker compose, configure videos.tribebenefits.com DNS, install Cap Desktop on founders' machines and connect to server
tasks.details: git clone https://github.com/CapSoftware/Cap; cd Cap; docker compose up -d; Configure nginx reverse proxy with SSL via certbot; Update DNS A record for videos.tribebenefits.com to server IP; Download Cap Desktop v2.15+ for macOS/Windows; Test connection by starting a 30s recording
tasks.testStrategy: Verify Cap web UI accessible at https://videos.tribebenefits.com; Confirm Desktop app connects and records/uploads 30s test video; Check video appears in Cap dashboard with playback

tasks.title: Implement Cap webhook to GitHub transcript pipeline
tasks.description: Route Cap's Whisper transcripts via webhook to commit raw/transcripts/YYYY-MM-DD-title.md files to GitHub repo
tasks.details: Cap auto-generates transcripts on upload; Add webhook endpoint in Cap config to POST to Node.js/Flask receiver; Receiver parses JSON with transcript text/timestamps; Format as markdown with speaker labels; Use GitHub API with PAT to commit to main branch in raw/transcripts/; Handle filename sanitization and dedup by meeting ID
tasks.testStrategy: Record 5min meeting on Cap Desktop; Verify webhook fires and .md file appears in repo within 2min; Validate transcript accuracy >90% WER against audio; Check git history shows clean commit

tasks.title: Build meeting processor Claude agent
tasks.description: Create agent that reads new raw transcripts and outputs structured JSON: tasks/decisions/ideas/open-questions with owner/source/timestamp/confidence; writes to wiki/meetings/YYYY-MM-DD-proposed.md
tasks.details: Use Claude 3.5 Sonnet API; Prompt template: 'Extract from transcript: [{type: "task"|"decision"|"idea"|"question", owner: string|null, quote: string, timestamp: MM:SS, confidence: "high"|"medium"|"low"}]'; Git clone anthropic-sdk; Poll raw/transcripts/ every 5min via cron; Match filename to generate proposed.md; Commit via GitHub API
tasks.testStrategy: Process 3 real meeting transcripts; Manual review JSON extraction accuracy >80%; Verify confidence markers correct (explicit=high, inferred=medium); Check proposed.md renders correctly in markdown viewer

tasks.title: Wire up post-meeting review screen
tasks.description: Implement tribe-meeting-confirm.html from Phase 1 mockup: read proposed.md, display items with quotes, add Confirm/Edit/Skip/Confirm-All buttons that commit to wiki
tasks.details: Use vanilla JS + GitHub API; Fetch proposed.md via raw.githubusercontent.com; Parse frontmatter JSON + markdown quotes; UI: collapsible sections per item type; Actions: PATCH proposed.md status or create new files (tasks.md, decisions/YYYY-MM-DD.md, ideas/); Confirm-All bulk commits all high-confidence items
tasks.testStrategy: Load real proposed.md; Test all actions: verify GitHub commits created/updated files; Confirm-All processes 10+ items in <5s; Edge case: empty proposed.md shows 'Nothing to review'

tasks.title: Build pre-meeting brief generator
tasks.description: Scheduled job runs 1hr before 'founders sync' calendar events; pulls brainstorms/lane/radar/parks/group-table; writes wiki/meetings/YYYY-MM-DD-briefing.md
tasks.details: Use Google Calendar API (founders' calendars); Cron job every 15min checks next 2hrs for tagged events; Claude agent prompt synthesizes: 'Recent open items + context for [event]'; Git commit briefing.md with sections: Open Tasks/Decisions/Stale Items/Context; Link to sources
tasks.testStrategy: Create test calendar event; Verify briefing.md generated 1hr prior; Manual check content pulls from 5+ wiki sources accurately; Test with no events shows empty state

tasks.title: Implement watcher system runner
tasks.description: Runner reads watchers/ directory files, parses schedule/Gmail query, executes per-founder agents to update target lane pages with confidence/source links
tasks.details: Node.js cron runner: glob('watchers/*.md'); Parse YAML frontmatter {founder, query, targetPage, schedule}; Use Gmail API (MCP for Shawn); Feed matching emails to Claude agent; Agent outputs JSON updates with confidence; Append to target wiki page via GitHub API; Add source-link markdown [[source][gmail://id]]
tasks.testStrategy: Create dummy watcher file; Verify runner parses/executes on schedule; Test Gmail query returns 3+ emails; Check lane page updates with confidence markers and clickable source links

tasks.title: Ship Shawn's EDE watcher
tasks.description: Create watchers/shawn-ede.md from design template; connect Shawn's Gmail via MCP; verify EDE lane auto-updates from real CMS/ID.me emails
tasks.details: Template: frontmatter with query:'from:(id.me OR cms.gov) (EDE|renewal|status)', target:'wiki/lanes/ede.md', schedule:'daily'; Test with Shawn's real credentials; Agent extracts status/expiry/dates with high-confidence explicit statements; Add 'needs-confirmation' badge for medium/low
tasks.testStrategy: Run watcher manually x3 days; Verify EDE lane updates from real emails; Check confidence markers (explicit renewal=high); Tune ignore list for marketing emails

tasks.title: Build iMessage SQLite reader
tasks.description: Python cron script on Shawn's Mac reads ~/Library/Messages/chat.db, filters founders group chat, exports new messages to raw/imessage/YYYY-MM-DD.md every 15min
tasks.details: pip install sqlite3 pandas; Query: SELECT text, date, handle_id FROM messages WHERE date>last_run AND handle_id IN (founders_chat_ids); Format markdown timeline with timestamps/senders/text; Track last_run timestamp in .last_run file; git commit via API; Handle offline catch-up
tasks.testStrategy: Send 10 test messages in group chat; Verify script captures exactly founders chat only; Check raw/imessage/ files contain complete thread since last run; Test catch-up after 1hr offline

tasks.title: Implement reimbursement extractor agent
tasks.description: Agent processes raw/imessage/ files, pattern-matches dollar amounts with context verbs, creates/updates wiki/reimbursements.md with checkboxes/balances
tasks.details: Regex: (spent|paid|expensed|reimburse).*?\$?([0-9,]+\.?[0-9]{2}); Claude agent validates context + extracts who/purpose/date; Append to reimbursements.md table: | Date | Who | Amount | Description | [x] Settled |; Calculate running balances per founder; Dedup by message ID
tasks.testStrategy: Test with 20 sample messages (10 true positives, 10 false like 'about $50'); Verify >90% accuracy; Check table updates and balances math correct; Test settle checkbox updates via review UI

tasks.title: Build commitment extractor and search upgrade
tasks.description: Extract commitments/decisions from iMessage to Group Table/lanes; Implement semantic+keyword search across wiki/raw with sqlite-vec embeddings and source links
tasks.details: Commitment agent: Claude prompt for action items/owners from iMessage; Update Group Table md table; Search: sqlite-vec DB, sentence-transformers/all-MiniLM-L6-v2; Chunk wiki+raw files to 512t; Query route: len<4 words=sqlite FTS5 keyword, else cosine sim top-5; UI shows synthesized answer + [[source]] links
tasks.testStrategy: iMessage: extract 5 real commitments accurately; Search: 10 queries (5 keyword, 5 semantic) return relevant results <2s with source links; Verify raw transcript fallback works; Test confidence badges render
